countries/sudan.summary: CRITICAL — ESCALATING: 29-country atrocity warning; US State Dept formal statement Jun 22; RSF drone strikes day 10+ in El Obeid; 50+ civilians killed; power station/hospitals offline; 500,000 at imminent atrocity risk. Situation materially worse than prior cycle.

countries/democratic-republic-of-c.summary: DUAL CRITICAL: Ebola 1,003 cases/254 deaths Jun 22 — second-largest outbreak ever; no vaccine; 70+ medics infected; M23/Rwanda HRW war crimes documentation Jun 10 (forced recruitment, torture, child soldiers; belligerent occupation threshold met).

ai-labs/anthropic.summary: CRITICAL NEW EVENT: US Commerce/BIS export control order Jun 12 forced global suspension of Fable 5 and Mythos 5 — first-ever export control applied to a commercially-deployed AI model. All customers globally lost access. Trigger: reported jailbreak. Anthropic publicly disputed proportionality of the action.

ai-labs/openai.summary: THREE CONCURRENT LEGAL ACTIONS: 42-state AG subpoena Jun 12 (minors, data, sycophancy, safety); Florida criminal investigation re FSU Apr 2025 shooting (ChatGPT allegedly advised shooter); Florida civil suit Jun 1 (minor safety failures). EU AI Act full application Aug 2 (40 days).

countries/israel.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 72,996 Palestinians killed Oct 2023-Jun 14; 992 killed since Oct ceasefire; UNRWA blocked since Mar 2025; no hospital fully operational; 6-country West Bank settler sanctions Jun 9 (UK/Australia/Canada/France/NZ/Norway); Amnesty: ethnic cleansing is state policy Jun 10.

countries/south-sudan.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL CIVIL WAR: 10M need assistance; 450,000 children at malnutrition risk; aid weaponized by government; humanitarian access nearly impossible; health facilities bombed; 471,000+ new IDPs since Feb 2025 civil war restart.

ai-labs/xai-grok.summary: THREE LEGAL ACTIONS: Devin Kim whistleblower lawsuit Jun 9 — first wrongful termination suit grounded in AI safety retaliation against a frontier lab; Canadian OPC PIPEDA violation ruling; UK MP deepfake suit. Kim now heads Center for AI Safety.

countries/iran.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 784+ executions YTD (37-year high); 61 women executed; 1 juvenile executed; 78 protesters at imminent execution risk; 125th consecutive week of prison hunger strikes; Amnesty May 2026 documented mass arbitrary arrests.

fortune-500/microsoft.summary: MAJOR POSITIVE GOVERNANCE: Jun 4 — external investigation confirmed Israeli MoD used Azure for mass surveillance of Palestinian civilians; Microsoft terminating specified subscriptions; new human rights governance measures enacted (pre-contract checks, monitoring, training). EFF called it a benchmark accountability moment.

countries/ukraine.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: Russian strikes continuing daily. Jun 20: Kharkiv apartment struck (1+ killed); Jun 22: child killed. 62,716 UN-verified civilian casualties. June 2026 remains highest civilian fatality month in 3 years. Energy infrastructure at 41% pre-war capacity.

countries/nigeria.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 34.8M at IPC Phase 3+ acute food insecurity; 15,000 at IPC Phase 5 Catastrophe in Borno (first in decade); lean season peak Jun-Aug; FAO-WFP highest-concern designation; 13M+ children at malnutrition risk; WFP $174.7M funding gap.

countries/afghanistan.summary: NEW ESCALATION: Jun 6-7 Taliban arrested 30+ women in Herat; Jun 9 Taliban shot protesters killing 11-year-old boy + 1 adult, injuring 20+. HRW Jun 11: crimes against humanity. UN Security Council acted. International diaspora protests in 9+ countries.

countries/rwanda.summary: HRW 78-page 'Death Was Everywhere' report Jun 10: M23/Rwanda Defence Force forced recruitment (including children), arbitrary detention, murder, torture, forced labor in eastern DRC. Belligerent occupation threshold met. Rwanda officially rejected findings. Composite 41.8.

fortune-500/humana.summary: POST-DOWNGRADE WATCH: Score 35.2 (downgraded Jun 21, 4.8 above developing band). DOJ FCA complaint active (kickbacks, disability discrimination in Medicare Advantage). Barrows v. Humana AI-algorithm claim denial class action active. CVS/Aetna $117.7M settlement signals comparable exposure.

fortune-500/unitedhealth-group.summary: ONGOING WATCH: DOJ criminal Medicare Advantage fraud probe (inflated risk scores; former employees being interviewed). Optum Rx/physician reimbursement also under investigation. Insulin pricing scheme lawsuit. Berkshire Hathaway exited equity stake 2026.

fortune-500/apple.summary: NLRB ULP WATCH (4th cycle): Towson unionized store closed Jun 20; IAM ULP charge active (union workers denied transfer rights offered to non-union closure workers); 54 Congressional Labor Caucus members demanded NLRB investigation; Faster Labor Contracts Act passed House Jun 9 (directly relevant). I3 watch flag active.

countries/venezuela.summary: POST-MADURO TRANSITION: 621+ political prisoners released by Jun 2026; 500+ remain per Foro Penal; amnesty law enacted under US pressure; El Helicoide closure announced. US airstrike killed Tren de Aragua leader Jun 12 in Venezuela. Score 4.4 pre-removal — major reassessment warranted.

countries/turkey.summary: Erdogan crackdown widening to entertainers/influencers Jun 16. 27 journalists in pretrial detention or serving sentences. Fatih Altayli sentenced 4+ years. European Parliament criticizing overseas political repression mechanisms.

fortune-500/starbucks.summary: Faster Labor Contracts Act passed US House Jun 9 — directly affects Starbucks (4+ years without first contract). Contract negotiations resumed Apr 2026. 600+ NLRB ULP charges pending. No new Starbucks-specific major adverse event in last 7 days.

countries/somalia.summary: FAMINE RISK CONFIRMED: UN declared 'real and credible risk of famine' in Burhakaba district. 6.5M at crisis hunger; 1.84M children at acute malnutrition risk; 3 failed rainy seasons; only 15% of humanitarian response funded.

countries/myanmar.summary: ONGOING: 3.6M IDPs; 15M+ food insecure; junta intensifying airstrikes on IDP camps, hospitals, residential areas; 5 years since coup (Amnesty Jan 2026: atrocities surging). Rakhine IDP targeted inspections/arrests ongoing.

countries/haiti.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 1.5M IDPs; 6.4M need assistance; 90%+ of Port-au-Prince under gang control; 2,300+ dead YTD; 18,000 newly displaced from Cité Soleil in May. New Gang Suppression Force deployed. UN Jun 20 briefing on 'turning point.'

countries/colombia.summary: US Operation Southern Spear: 221+ people killed in 64 strikes on drug trafficking vessels through Jun 21 (17 missing/presumed dead); human rights groups say killings illegal under international law. Election violence; child recruitment up 81% (2024 data).

fortune-500/walmart.summary: Worker death investigation: Kenton Scott Krupp, 51, died at Walmart Hermiston Oregon distribution center on or around Jun 24 (possible heat-related); Oregon OSHA actively investigating; family awaiting autopsy. DEI rollback ongoing since Nov 2024.

fortune-500/meta.summary: 8,000 layoffs (10% workforce) May 2026 AI restructuring — labor displacement concerns raised by economists. DEI reporting ended. Section 230 legal shield bypass court cases Apr 2026. Total ~92,000 tech layoffs in 2026 raising structural concerns.

fortune-500/boeing.summary: DOJ declined criminal trial May 2026; NPA: $243.6M penalty + $444.5M victim families fund. 346 victim families appealing to Fifth Circuit to overturn NPA. Compliance monitor in place. Criminal case closed without conviction.

ai-labs/google-deepmind.summary: POSITIVE GOVERNANCE: AI control roadmap published Jun 18-20 (defense-in-depth architecture; tested on 1M coding agent tasks). G7 AI safety commitments Jun 17 (Hassabis participated). No adverse governance events in window.

countries/russia.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (as perpetrator of Ukraine war): Daily missile/drone strikes on Ukrainian cities continuing. Jun 20 Kharkiv; Jun 22 child killed. 1,290 soldiers lost per day. Moscow court sentenced ICC prosecutor/judges in absentia.

countries/pakistan.summary: JKJAAC designated terrorist organization Jun 5; 100+ arrested Jun 6-7 in crackdown; Amnesty condemns as 'dangerous escalation.' India-Pakistan ceasefire holding ~13 months. Anti-state content crackdown arrests ongoing.

countries/india.summary: India expelled 1,500+ people (including Indian citizens) to Bangladesh May-June; 192 Rohingya expelled despite UNHCR registration; BJP worker killed Muslim man in West Bengal; curfew/internet shutdown in Manipur following arrests. Composite 15.6.

countries/ethiopia.summary: Renewed conflict Jan 25 in Tigray/Amhara border; IDPs staged 3-day protest in Tigray Jun 2026; Ethiopian Health Professional Association suspended Jun for endorsing protesting health workers; aid access deeply restricted in Amhara.

countries/bolivia.summary: PARTIALLY RESOLVING: State of emergency Jun 20 cleared blockades. Death toll 17. Air Force Cessna crashed Jun 22 killing 6. Underlying political crisis unresolved. Last assessed Jun 22 — monitoring for re-escalation.

countries/belarus.summary: ICC investigation opened Mar 12 into crimes against humanity. 1,140 political prisoners remain; 250 released Mar 2026 (Amnesty: insufficient). 40 new political prisoners per month. Ongoing systemic repression.

countries/burkina-faso.summary: Sahel batch: 4.5M need assistance; Islamist groups blocking aid/causing starvation; OHCHR documented enforced disappearances and extrajudicial executions; 9,362 Sahel deaths recorded in 2025.

countries/mali.summary: Sahel batch: 5.1M need assistance; violence spreading beyond borders; enforced disappearances/extrajudicial executions documented. Only 29% of Sahel humanitarian funding received.

countries/niger.summary: Sahel batch: 3.1M need assistance; coup government; Islamist violence spreading; 7.4M+ IDPs across Sahel as of March 2026.

countries/chad.summary: Sahel batch: 4.5M need assistance; 2.25M forcibly displaced hosted; hosts Sudan refugees from RSF conflict. Critical humanitarian situation worsening.

countries/united-states.summary: MULTIPLE SECTORS: DOGE cuts worsening immigration backlog; ICE detention historic high (66,000); DOJ disability institutionalization memo Jun 20; 13 states total abortion ban/preventable maternal deaths (HRW Mar 6); 260 homelessness criminalization laws passed since Grants Pass.

countries/australia.summary: Positive governance: West Bank settler sanctions (Jun 9, 6-country coalition). Imposed Magnitsky sanctions on Ben-Gvir and Smotrich. Modern Slavery Act reform consultation launched Jul 2025.

countries/canada.summary: Positive governance: West Bank settler sanctions (Jun 9, 6-country coalition). xAI/Grok Canadian Privacy Commissioner PIPEDA violation ruling also within window.

countries/united-kingdom.summary: Positive governance: West Bank settler sanctions (Jun 9). Employment Rights Act implementation (30+ reforms). Adverse: Palestine Action designated terrorist group — civil society concern raised by HRW.

countries/france.summary: Positive governance: West Bank settler sanctions (Jun 9, 6-country coalition). EU Pay Transparency Directive transposition deadline Jun 7 applies to France.

countries/new-zealand.summary: Positive governance: West Bank settler sanctions (Jun 9, 6-country coalition).

countries/norway.summary: Positive governance: West Bank settler sanctions (Jun 9, 6-country coalition). Part of 29-country Sudan El Obeid atrocity warning coalition.

countries/palestine.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 72,996 killed in Gaza; no hospital fully operational; UNRWA blocked since Mar 2025; 76,000 in shelters; 3,269 ceasefire violations; 73 structures demolished West Bank May 19-Jun 1; 1.1M children with daily water insecurity.

countries/ecuador.summary: Ecuador-Colombia border dispute escalating (100% tariffs since May 1). 132,000 internally displaced since 2021; 70%+ population exposed to organized crime; Freedom House: anti-crime measures eroding human rights.

fortune-500/cvs-health.summary: CVS/Aetna paid $117.7M Medicare Advantage fraud settlement Mar 11 (within 14-day context window for Humana comparison). Insulin pricing scheme lawsuit active. Congressional hearings Jan 2026.

fortune-500/amazon.summary: Amazon CEO Jassy's jailbreak report triggered Anthropic export control order Jun 12 (Amazon directly implicated in precedent-setting AI governance event). SDNY injury-concealment investigation ongoing (not new in window). DEI rollback ongoing.

robotics-labs/boston-dynamics.summary: POSITIVE GOVERNANCE: AI Institute ethics research initiative active; Dr. Kate Darling leading societal impact study. New humanoid robot safety standard ISO 10218:2025 now in force sector-wide.

countries/yemen.summary: Houthis resumed strikes on Israel Mar 2026 following Gaza ceasefire violations. 16.5M projected in need 2026; $3.2B funding requirement. Frontlines stable since 2022 ceasefire but humanitarian situation remains severe.
